When you draw the reversed Queen of Wands, it reveals a complex emotional landscape. If you’re asking how this person feels about you, they may be experiencing insecurity or self-doubt in your relationship. Their feelings could be clouded by jealousy or fear of inadequacy, leading them to question their own worthiness and connection with you. They might admire your confidence but feel overshadowed, struggling to express their true emotions.  
  
This card surfaces when it’s time to reflect on your own feelings; you may also be grappling with uncertainty and frustration. You might feel stifled creatively or emotionally drained, questioning whether you're truly being authentic in your interactions. This is a call for introspection; consider what aspects of yourself need nurturing so that both you and this person can flourish together.

### Reversed Queen of Wands as Actions

When you draw the reversed Queen of Wands, it’s a signal to pause and reflect on your ambitions and motivations. This card indicates a need to reconnect with your inner self, as you may be feeling scattered or lacking direction. Focus on nurturing your creativity rather than pushing for external validation. Consider engaging in activities that inspire you, such as journaling or exploring new hobbies. Additionally, evaluate your relationships; are they supportive? Surround yourself with those who uplift you while letting go of toxic influences. Embrace this time for introspection to reignite your passion and purpose in life.

Queen of Wands Tarot Cheat Sheet
--------------------------------

![Queen of Wands Meaning - Tarot Card Meanings Cheat Sheet](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/1325/0879/files/tarot-card-meanings-suit-wands-queen-of-wands.png?v=1487793844)

metadata.title: Page of Wands Meaning - Tarot Card Meanings
metadata.author: Tina Gong
metadata.description: A well-dressed young man is boldly holding a stick standing on a barren land. His shirt is made in a salamander like pattern which is a symbol of transformation from bad to good. This young man is a passionate advocator, who is constantly spreading spiritual and social advancement ideas that lift up his fellow man. The desert in the background behind him both is indicative of his element, fire, and also represents that he is living in a world that has not bared fruit yet. His ideas are therefore completely hypothetical. However, if he were to choose to use them, and undertake the journey of his suit, his purity of heart could lead him to find better fortunes.
metadata.upright_meaning:
When we see the Page of Wands, we see a youth with enormous excitement and curiosity for the world. He knows what to do, he has the passion to succeed, but due to his inexperience and maybe a little fear of the unknown, his ideas remain abstract. He identifies new worlds to explore, new opportunities he could take advantage of quite easily, and he is even gifted with the "big picture" vision needed to succeed. Even with all of this, he still has the tendency to either remain dormant, or get easily distracted with one idea after the other. If he doesn't learn to control this, it might be that he squanders the opportunities to advance himself.

> When you get the Page of Wands, it simply means something is within you, something that triggers you to make discoveries, indulge in investments or take the next advancement in life.

When you get the Page of Wands, it simply means something is within you, something that triggers you to make discoveries, indulge in investments or take the next advancement in life. You could be just about to take a move on a certain idea, but some conflicting messages keep coming to your mind, and you get discouraged. This card resembles your inner battles which are preventing you from expressing your heroism to the world, to let the world know that you exist for a reason.   
  
If you are wise enough, this card is normally a trigger of courage. It should make you overcome the personal discouragements and move forward boldly to launch your ideas in the real world. Remove the fear, gather your resources and do something. Let the world know that you are there and you have no jokes about moving forward in the path that you choose. Conquer every obstacle, let your ideas shine and be known to the world because this card indicates a level of success that can only be achieved when courage is deployed.
metadata.upright_love_meaning: The world is brimming with possibilities with the Page of Wands tarot love meaning. If you’re single, you’ll find yourself excited to meet new people, and explore new realms when it comes to love and romance. You may also meet someone who embodies this page in your love life. As a person, the Page of Wands represents someone adventurous and lively, who falls in love quickly, but may also get bored quickly. Because they live for experiencing new things, it may be difficult to create a long term relationship with this person, but a fleeting romance could be rewarding. Couples may also find themselves more willing to try new things; you may take classes together, discover new hobbies, and even explore new adventures in the bedroom.
metadata.upright_career_meaning: The page of wands can be a great signal when it comes to new ventures. In the context of your career, it might mean that you are about to enter a new position or take up a new project. In either event, this card is a good sign; it signals that success and contentment will follow you in this endeavor. When the page appears, it is also an ideal time to take some risks with work. Just be wary of moving too quickly. The page represents an eagerness for challenges not necessarily a readiness to confront them. Ask yourself if you are prepared for new tasks before you start them. That being said, if you are ready, now is an ideal time to take some chances and start new projects.
metadata.upright_finances_meaning: The page of wands hints that you might find a bit of money in the near future. This unexpected income can come in many forms. Someone might give you money as a gift, or you could get an unexpected bonus from work. While it is always fun to spend such extra cash, try to save some for the future. Your finances might experience a dip, and when they do, you will be thankful for this cushion. While this is always a wise choice, it is particularly important to keep in mind with the page of wands as he has a tendency to be short-sighted on such issues. Do not give in to the temptations of quick spending even if it feels like you are capable of doing so.
metadata.reversal_meaning: With the Page of Wands reversed, it tends to emphasize the more negative character traits of the upright version. He tends to show up when your mind is filled with one great idea after another, and are unable to progress beyond the beginning planning stages. Perhaps you have started a project or a hobby expecting that it would grow to great levels and instead you end up nowhere. As painful as it is, it is a good way of telling you that you should venture into other meaningful projects and avoid wasting time.
metadata.reversal_love_meaning: If you’re single, the reversed Page of Wands tarot love meaning can signal a person who may not be suited to commitment. They may not know what they want from their lives, and are likely to be wandering and unreliable. Their fiery personality may get them into trouble as well. This card can also indicate a period in your love life when you are unsure of what you’re looking for; without a clear direction, you may run into dead ends. You may need to spend more time deciding what it is you want in a partner instead of aimlessly searching for love. Should you be in a relationship, this card can signal a time of boredom and lack fo of momentum. You’ll need to put in some effort to bring some life back into your partnership.
metadata.reversal_career_meaning: The reversed page here indicates that you might be experiencing a disconnect between your desired career and your current one. This dissonance can be from a number of different causes. It could be that you know where you want to be but are unsure of how to get there. This can manifest in feelings of stagnation or ennui at work. Alternatively, you might know all the steps you would need to take to realize your goals but lack the motivation to take them. Regardless of the cause, take stock of where you are, where you want to be, and try to find out what will help you get there. Nothing is permanent; so, do not think that this current state will continue forever. It will, however, pass faster if you can realize what has been holding you back.
metadata.reversal_finances_meaning: The page of wands can mean financial instability. Likely, this instability is the result of a lack of foresight. You might have been overconfident financially in the past and are now dealing with the repercussions. Let this time remind you that fortunes, both good and bad, have a tendency to change. Next time you find yourself a little more prosperous than you expected, remember this low moment and use it as motivation to save. At present, the best you can do is weather the storm by working hard and being frugal.

Page_of_Wands_Meaning.markdown:
Page of Wands Keywords
----------------------

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| **Upright Keywords** | **Reversed Keywords** |
| adventure, excitement, fresh ideas, cheerfulness, energetic, fearless, extroverted | hasty, impatient, lacking ideas, tantrums, laziness, boring, unreliable, distracted |
| [Skip to Upright Meaning](#up) | [Skip to Reversed Meaning](#rev) |

![Comparing the Page of Wands  across multiple decks. From left to right, the Classic 1910 Rider Waite Smith Deck, the Tarot de Marseille, the Seventh Sphere Tarot and the Arcana Iris Sacra.](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/1325/0879/files/page-of-wands-tarot-card-deck-comparisons-meanings-keywords.webp)

Comparing the Page of Wands across different tarot decks.

Page of Wands Tarot Card Description
------------------------------------

A well-dressed young man is boldly holding a stick standing on a barren land. His shirt is made in a salamander like pattern which is a symbol of transformation from bad to good. This young man is a passionate advocator, who is constantly spreading spiritual and social advancement ideas that lift up his fellow man. The desert in the background behind him both is indicative of his element, fire, and also represents that he is living in a world that has not bared fruit yet. His ideas are therefore completely hypothetical. However, if he were to choose to use them, and undertake the journey of his suit, his purity of heart could lead him to find better fortunes.

Upright Page of Wands Meaning
-----------------------------

When we see the Page of Wands, we see a youth with enormous excitement and curiosity for the world. He knows what to do, he has the passion to succeed, but due to his inexperience and maybe a little fear of the unknown, his ideas remain abstract. He identifies new worlds to explore, new opportunities he could take advantage of quite easily, and he is even gifted with the "big picture" vision needed to succeed. Even with all of this, he still has the tendency to either remain dormant, or get easily distracted with one idea after the other. If he doesn't learn to control this, it might be that he squanders the opportunities to advance himself.

> When you get the Page of Wands, it simply means something is within you, something that triggers you to make discoveries, indulge in investments or take the next advancement in life.

When you get the Page of Wands, it simply means something is within you, something that triggers you to make discoveries, indulge in investments or take the next advancement in life. You could be just about to take a move on a certain idea, but some conflicting messages keep coming to your mind, and you get discouraged. This card resembles your inner battles which are preventing you from expressing your heroism to the world, to let the world know that you exist for a reason.   
  
If you are wise enough, this card is normally a trigger of courage. It should make you overcome the personal discouragements and move forward boldly to launch your ideas in the real world. Remove the fear, gather your resources and do something. Let the world know that you are there and you have no jokes about moving forward in the path that you choose. Conquer every obstacle, let your ideas shine and be known to the world because this card indicates a level of success that can only be achieved when courage is deployed.

|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Upright Love Meaning** | **Upright Career Meaning** | **Upright Finances Meaning** |
| possibilities and adventures in love, lively lover, fleeting romance | new position or project, taking risks at work, eagerness for challenge | small financial gifts, temptations regarding spending |

### Upright Page of Wands Tarot Love Meaning

The world is brimming with possibilities with the Page of Wands tarot love meaning. If you’re single, you’ll find yourself excited to meet new people, and explore new realms when it comes to love and romance. You may also meet someone who embodies this page in your love life. As a person, the Page of Wands represents someone adventurous and lively, who falls in love quickly, but may also get bored quickly. Because they live for experiencing new things, it may be difficult to create a long term relationship with this person, but a fleeting romance could be rewarding. Couples may also find themselves more willing to try new things; you may take classes together, discover new hobbies, and even explore new adventures in the bedroom.

### Career Meaning - Upright Page of Wands

The page of wands can be a great signal when it comes to new ventures. In the context of your career, it might mean that you are about to enter a new position or take up a new project. In either event, this card is a good sign; it signals that success and contentment will follow you in this endeavor. When the page appears, it is also an ideal time to take some risks with work. Just be wary of moving too quickly. The page represents an eagerness for challenges not necessarily a readiness to confront them. Ask yourself if you are prepared for new tasks before you start them. That being said, if you are ready, now is an ideal time to take some chances and start new projects.

### Finances Meaning - Upright Page of Wands

The page of wands hints that you might find a bit of money in the near future. This unexpected income can come in many forms. Someone might give you money as a gift, or you could get an unexpected bonus from work. While it is always fun to spend such extra cash, try to save some for the future. Your finances might experience a dip, and when they do, you will be thankful for this cushion. While this is always a wise choice, it is particularly important to keep in mind with the page of wands as he has a tendency to be short-sighted on such issues. Do not give in to the temptations of quick spending even if it feels like you are capable of doing so.

### Upright Page of Wands as Feelings

The Page of Wands bursts onto the scene, radiating excitement and enthusiasm about how someone feels for you. This person is drawn to your energy and charisma, inspired by your adventurous spirit. They see endless potential in what could blossom between you two, fueling their curiosity and desire to explore deeper connections. Their feelings are fresh and vibrant, reflecting a readiness to take risks for passion.  
  
On your end, the Page of Wands signals a surge of creativity and optimism within you. You’re invigorated by new possibilities surrounding this relationship. An eagerness stirs inside you to embrace change and chase what excites your heart, urging you to step boldly into uncharted territory with confidence and joy.

### Upright Page of Wands as Actions

When you draw the upright Page of Wands, it’s a clear signal to embrace your creative impulses and explore new opportunities. This card encourages you to take bold actions, such as starting a new project or pursuing a passion that excites you. Consider taking a class in something you've always wanted to learn or engaging in activities that spark your curiosity. Shift your perspective by viewing challenges as adventures rather than obstacles; this mindset will fuel your enthusiasm and drive. Connect with like-minded individuals who inspire you, share ideas, and collaborate on exciting ventures that ignite your spirit and propel you forward.

Page of Wands Reversal Meaning
------------------------------

With the Page of Wands reversed, it tends to emphasize the more negative character traits of the upright version. He tends to show up when your mind is filled with one great idea after another, and are unable to progress beyond the beginning planning stages. Perhaps you have started a project or a hobby expecting that it would grow to great levels and instead you end up nowhere. As painful as it is, it is a good way of telling you that you should venture into other meaningful projects and avoid wasting time.

|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Reversed Love Meaning** | **Reversed Career Meaning** | **Reversed Finances Meaning** |
| failure to commit, unreliable lover, aimless search for love | boredom with job, lack of vigor in pursuing career goals | financial instability, overspending in past creating problems now |

### Reversed Page of Wands Tarot Love Meaning

If you’re single, the reversed Page of Wands tarot love meaning can signal a person who may not be suited to commitment. They may not know what they want from their lives, and are likely to be wandering and unreliable. Their fiery personality may get them into trouble as well. This card can also indicate a period in your love life when you are unsure of what you’re looking for; without a clear direction, you may run into dead ends. You may need to spend more time deciding what it is you want in a partner instead of aimlessly searching for love. Should you be in a relationship, this card can signal a time of boredom and lack fo of momentum. You’ll need to put in some effort to bring some life back into your partnership.

### Career Meaning - Reversed Page of Wands

The reversed page here indicates that you might be experiencing a disconnect between your desired career and your current one. This dissonance can be from a number of different causes. It could be that you know where you want to be but are unsure of how to get there. This can manifest in feelings of stagnation or ennui at work. Alternatively, you might know all the steps you would need to take to realize your goals but lack the motivation to take them. Regardless of the cause, take stock of where you are, where you want to be, and try to find out what will help you get there. Nothing is permanent; so, do not think that this current state will continue forever. It will, however, pass faster if you can realize what has been holding you back.

### Finances Meaning - Reversed Page of Wands

The page of wands can mean financial instability. Likely, this instability is the result of a lack of foresight. You might have been overconfident financially in the past and are now dealing with the repercussions. Let this time remind you that fortunes, both good and bad, have a tendency to change. Next time you find yourself a little more prosperous than you expected, remember this low moment and use it as motivation to save. At present, the best you can do is weather the storm by working hard and being frugal.

### Reversed Page of Wands as Feelings

When the reversed Page of Wands appears in your reading, it reveals a sense of uncertainty and hesitation. This person may feel uninspired or lack the enthusiasm they once had, possibly questioning their own desires and motivations regarding your connection. They might be grappling with self-doubt or feeling overwhelmed by external pressures, leading them to withdraw emotionally rather than engage fully.  
  
With regard to your own feelings, this card suggests that you could be experiencing restlessness or frustration. You may find yourself yearning for excitement but feeling stifled by routine or fear of taking risks. It’s essential to acknowledge these emotions and explore what ignites your passion again; consider what steps you can take to reignite that spark within yourself while navigating this complex emotional landscape with awareness and intention.

### Reversed Page of Wands as Actions

When you draw the reversed Page of Wands, it’s a signal to pause and reassess your current pursuits. This card indicates a need to shift your perspective, perhaps by exploring new interests or creative outlets that ignite your passion. Instead of rushing into projects or ideas, take time to reflect on what truly excites you. In practical terms, consider journaling about your aspirations or engaging in activities like painting or writing that allow for self-expression without pressure. Additionally, seek out mentorship from someone who inspires you; their guidance can help clarify your path forward and reignite your enthusiasm for life’s possibilities.

Page of Wands Tarot Cheat Sheet
-------------------------------

![Page of Wands Meaning - Tarot Card Meanings Cheat Sheet](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/1325/0879/files/tarot-card-meanings-suit-wands-page-of-wands.png?v=1487793853)

metadata.title: Two of Wands Meaning - Tarot Card Meanings
metadata.author: Tina Gong
metadata.description: The Two of Wands card features a man standing on top of what looks like a castle and in his right hand he holds a miniature globe. From the way he is standing, the man is looking down upon the vast terrain, in which an ocean lies on the left-hand side, whilst the land stretches over on the right-hand side. The man is wearing an orange tunic and a red hat, symbolizing his enthusiasm towards life itself and hunger for adventure respectively. The miniature globe in his hand represents potential for possible expansion of his reach to broader life experiences.
metadata.upright_meaning:
The Two of Wands is a more mature version of the ace of wands, meaning that that this tarot card is all about planning and moving forward – progression. Look at it this way; you have already set out to achieve a particular task, which means you have turned an idea into a realistic plan. Such a plan will require fulfillment and therefore you have to progress from just having the plan to actually achieving what you set out for.  
  
Discovery is being considered as another two of wands meaning. This is because it means that you are stepping out of your cocoon and exploring new experiences and worlds. While the beginning might seem tough and difficult, the Two of Wands card encourages you to strive on and push forward.

> The Two of Wands is a more mature version of the ace of wands, meaning that that this tarot card is all about planning and moving forward – progression.

The Two of Wands card also means that you are beginning to realize your objectives and long-term goals before you set out to achieve these objectives. In other words, you have strived to get to where you are and now, moving forward, you have your long-term goals in mind.

In summary, the Two of Wands meaning revolves around making decisions. In other words, you are either satisfied with your current knowledge, or you are moving forward and taking risks. It means, leaving our comfort zones and exploring new territory.
metadata.upright_love_meaning: What goals do you have when it comes to your romantic life right now? The 2 of Wands tarot love meaning can signal that you’re in the process of considering changes, and making the plans to do so. If you’re in a relationship, you have the chance right now to make adjustments. If you are considering taking your commitment to the next level, this card suggests great promise, so long as you do the work to envision exactly what you want, and put your thoughts into action. Communicate with your partner, and create a path together into the future that you both want. Decisions you make together now can have the profound ability to push the two of you closer together.
metadata.upright_career_meaning: When upright in the career position, the two of wands signifies that you are making plans for your future career. You may be taking a look at your ambitions and charting a path towards that dream. You can be considering the ideal company to work for, what your specialty may be, or laying down plans to start your own business. This can be an exciting time for you as your dreams are taking shape. Let these first steps be a strong motivation to continue down this path.
metadata.upright_finances_meaning: When it comes to your finances, the two of wands represents financial stability. This stability does not necessarily mean overflowing wealth but signifies that your situation is comfortable and steady. You may be comfortable enough to be making plans for your long term financial future. It is a good time to make conscious choices without fear of serious repercussions. If you have access to money, consider investing it in savings.
metadata.reversal_meaning:
The Two of Wands reversed meaning suggests the need to set up long-term goals. Begin the process of setting up your goals by identifying what to you is important. Proceed by planning how you intend on achieving such goals.   
  
Another Two of Wands reversal meaning suggests that you have ignored important fine points associated with planning your future. Lack of proper planning could be the reason for your downfall.   
  
Other interpretations can include either overconfidence or lack of patience, both are possible in bringing you disarray in your path forward.
metadata.reversal_love_meaning: Sometimes, regardless of one’s plans for the future, things don’t fall into place. Now may not be the best time to push your romantic goals forward. Love takes time to happen, and you may have to be more patient than usual. It is best to use this time to really consider what it is you want from your love life, and figure out a clear path to achieve it. The 2 of Wands is a card of planning, setting expectations and charting a path forward, and the best laid plans are ones that start from a clear vision. The 2 of Wands love tarot meaning can also signal you may be experiencing some hesitancy when it comes to your romantic interests.
metadata.reversal_career_meaning: The two of wands, when reversed, can have two meanings. You may find that the plans that you laid out for your career path are not going the way that you envisioned. You may have missed details and had many obstacles that you did not foresee. These issues are creating trouble for you now. Alternatively, you may have made all the plans in the world; perhaps drawing out several scenarios and outlined all the risks. But fear may prevent you from taking your first steps. Instead of overanalyzing every single detail, it may be better for you to just take action. One cannot plan for everything; we have to trust in our own ability.
metadata.reversal_finances_meaning: A reversed two of wands here can signal financial instability. This does not mean huge losses or huge gains so much as general chaos in your bank accounts. Your plans for your financial future may not be panning out, and this can be a tumultuous time economically for you. Do not use this time to make investments or large purchases right now, but instead take a closer look at your numbers and what your long term goals are. Try and get more clarity.

Two_of_Wands_Meaning.markdown:
2 of Wands Keywords
-------------------

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| **Upright Keywords** | **Reversed Keywords** |
| planning, first steps, making decisions, leaving comfort, taking risks | bad planning, overanalyzing, not taking action, playing it safe, avoiding risk |
| [Skip to Upright Meaning](#up) | [Skip to Reversed Meaning](#rev) |

![Comparing the Two of Wands  across multiple decks. From left to right, the Classic 1910 Rider Waite Smith Deck, the Tarot de Marseille, the Seventh Sphere Tarot and the Arcana Iris Sacra.](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/1325/0879/files/2-two-of-wands-tarot-card-deck-comparisons-meanings-keywords.webp)

Comparing the Two of Wands across different tarot decks.

 

The Two of Wands Tarot Card Description
---------------------------------------

The Two of Wands card features a man standing on top of what looks like a castle and in his right hand he holds a miniature globe. From the way he is standing, the man is looking down upon the vast terrain, in which an ocean lies on the left-hand side, whilst the land stretches over on the right-hand side. The man is wearing an orange tunic and a red hat, symbolizing his enthusiasm towards life itself and hunger for adventure respectively. The miniature globe in his hand represents potential for possible expansion of his reach to broader life experiences.

Upright Two of Wands Meaning
----------------------------

The Two of Wands is a more mature version of the ace of wands, meaning that that this tarot card is all about planning and moving forward – progression. Look at it this way; you have already set out to achieve a particular task, which means you have turned an idea into a realistic plan. Such a plan will require fulfillment and therefore you have to progress from just having the plan to actually achieving what you set out for.  
  
Discovery is being considered as another two of wands meaning. This is because it means that you are stepping out of your cocoon and exploring new experiences and worlds. While the beginning might seem tough and difficult, the Two of Wands card encourages you to strive on and push forward.

> The Two of Wands is a more mature version of the ace of wands, meaning that that this tarot card is all about planning and moving forward – progression.

The Two of Wands card also means that you are beginning to realize your objectives and long-term goals before you set out to achieve these objectives. In other words, you have strived to get to where you are and now, moving forward, you have your long-term goals in mind.

In summary, the Two of Wands meaning revolves around making decisions. In other words, you are either satisfied with your current knowledge, or you are moving forward and taking risks. It means, leaving our comfort zones and exploring new territory.

|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Upright Love Meaning** | **Upright Career Meaning** | **Upright Finances Meaning** |
| setting romantic goals, making plans in love, planning future together | planning your career, taking first steps in your career, envisioning dreams | planning your long term financial future, laying foundations |

### Upright 2 of Wands Tarot Love Meaning

What goals do you have when it comes to your romantic life right now? The 2 of Wands tarot love meaning can signal that you’re in the process of considering changes, and making the plans to do so. If you’re in a relationship, you have the chance right now to make adjustments. If you are considering taking your commitment to the next level, this card suggests great promise, so long as you do the work to envision exactly what you want, and put your thoughts into action. Communicate with your partner, and create a path together into the future that you both want. Decisions you make together now can have the profound ability to push the two of you closer together.

### Career Meaning - Upright 2 of Wands

When upright in the career position, the two of wands signifies that you are making plans for your future career. You may be taking a look at your ambitions and charting a path towards that dream. You can be considering the ideal company to work for, what your specialty may be, or laying down plans to start your own business. This can be an exciting time for you as your dreams are taking shape. Let these first steps be a strong motivation to continue down this path.

### Finances Meaning - Upright 2 of Wands

When it comes to your finances, the two of wands represents financial stability. This stability does not necessarily mean overflowing wealth but signifies that your situation is comfortable and steady. You may be comfortable enough to be making plans for your long term financial future. It is a good time to make conscious choices without fear of serious repercussions. If you have access to money, consider investing it in savings.

### Upright Two of Wands as Feelings

The upright Two of Wands signals a thrilling sense of anticipation and potential. This person is captivated by the possibilities that lie ahead with you, feeling a blend of excitement and contemplation as they weigh their options. They view your connection as an opportunity for growth and adventure, showing their openness to exploring what could blossom between you two.  
  
Your feelings mirror this energy; the Two of Wands indicates you're at a crossroads, reflecting on your desires and ambitions. You may feel inspired yet hesitant about taking the next step in this relationship. This card urges you to embrace your aspirations while considering how this connection aligns with your future goals, pushing you to act on what truly excites you.

### Upright Two of Wands as Actions

The arrival of the Two of Wands suggests that now is the time for you to expand your horizons and embrace new opportunities. This card encourages you to take a step back and assess your current situation, envisioning where you want to go next. Consider exploring different perspectives or ideas that challenge your usual way of thinking. In practical terms, this could mean researching potential career paths, networking with individuals in fields that interest you, or even planning a trip to gain fresh insights. Embrace this moment as an invitation to strategize and set ambitious goals for yourself; the world is full of possibilities waiting for you to seize them.

Reversed Two of Wands Meaning
-----------------------------

The Two of Wands reversed meaning suggests the need to set up long-term goals. Begin the process of setting up your goals by identifying what to you is important. Proceed by planning how you intend on achieving such goals.   
  
Another Two of Wands reversal meaning suggests that you have ignored important fine points associated with planning your future. Lack of proper planning could be the reason for your downfall.   
  
Other interpretations can include either overconfidence or lack of patience, both are possible in bringing you disarray in your path forward.

|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Reversed Love Meaning** | **Reversed Career Meaning** | **Reversed Finances Meaning** |
| failed romantic plans, lack of long term prospects or ideas of future | unexpected obstacles in career, overanalyzing, not taking action on plans | lack of control regarding finances, failed financial planning |

### Reversed 2 of Wands Tarot Love Meaning

Sometimes, regardless of one’s plans for the future, things don’t fall into place. Now may not be the best time to push your romantic goals forward. Love takes time to happen, and you may have to be more patient than usual. It is best to use this time to really consider what it is you want from your love life, and figure out a clear path to achieve it. The 2 of Wands is a card of planning, setting expectations and charting a path forward, and the best laid plans are ones that start from a clear vision. The 2 of Wands love tarot meaning can also signal you may be experiencing some hesitancy when it comes to your romantic interests.

### Career Meaning - Reversed 2 of Wands

The two of wands, when reversed, can have two meanings. You may find that the plans that you laid out for your career path are not going the way that you envisioned. You may have missed details and had many obstacles that you did not foresee. These issues are creating trouble for you now. Alternatively, you may have made all the plans in the world; perhaps drawing out several scenarios and outlined all the risks. But fear may prevent you from taking your first steps. Instead of overanalyzing every single detail, it may be better for you to just take action. One cannot plan for everything; we have to trust in our own ability.

### Finances Meaning - Reversed 2 of Wands

A reversed two of wands here can signal financial instability. This does not mean huge losses or huge gains so much as general chaos in your bank accounts. Your plans for your financial future may not be panning out, and this can be a tumultuous time economically for you. Do not use this time to make investments or large purchases right now, but instead take a closer look at your numbers and what your long term goals are. Try and get more clarity.

### Reversed Two of Wands as Feelings

In the presence of the reversed Two of Wands, it suggests that this person is grappling with uncertainty and indecision. They may feel hesitant or conflicted, struggling to envision a future together. Their feelings are clouded by doubts and fears of taking risks, leading them to hold back rather than fully engage with their emotions.  
  
With regard to your own feelings, the reversed Two of Wands indicates that you might be experiencing similar confusion. You could be feeling restless or unsure about your path forward, questioning whether this connection aligns with your aspirations. This card encourages you to reflect on what truly matters to you and consider if you're ready to embrace new possibilities or if fear is holding you back from pursuing what you desire.

### Reversed Two of Wands as Actions

When you draw the Two of Wands reversed, it’s a signal to turn inward and reflect. You may be feeling uncertain about your direction or hesitant to take risks. Instead of pushing forward, focus on evaluating your current plans and ambitions. Consider journaling to clarify your thoughts or seeking advice from trusted mentors who can offer fresh perspectives. It might also be beneficial to step back from any overwhelming commitments, allowing yourself space to explore new ideas without pressure. Embrace this moment as an opportunity to redefine what success means for you, ensuring that your next steps align with your true desires and values.

Two of Wands Tarot Cheat Sheet
------------------------------

![Two of Wands Meaning - Tarot Card Meanings Cheat Sheet](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/1325/0879/files/tarot-card-meanings-suit-wands-two-of-wands.png?v=1487809686)

metadata.title: Three of Wands Meaning - Tarot Card Meanings
metadata.author: Tina Gong
metadata.description: The Three of Wands depicts a man who is standing on the edge of a cliff, looking over the ocean and the mountains. From the cliff edge, he sees everything that is ahead of him. The Wands are planted into the ground and surround the man as he grasps one in his hand. He seems to look forward and reflect on both the commitment that he has for his plans, as well as the method of execution in order to bring them to reality.
metadata.upright_meaning:
The meaning of the Three of Wands hints that you are planning or going to plan for the future with more conviction. This could mean that everything around your plans is going smoothly, as you have taken the time to plan your future, and are taking steps to turn plans into action. It hints that you are perhaps creating a stable foundation for yourself.  
  
The symbolism within the Three of Wands is that opportunities that can take place to widen your horizons in many areas. It also is a warning to keep your mind open as better opportunities could open up to you. As you take steps towards achieving what you set out to do, you are also becoming more aware of opportunities that are coming your way, and this could be take you out of your comfort zone. This pushes you to sometimes embrace change, and to start thinking in the long-term.

> The Three of Wands hints that you are creating a stable foundation for yourself.

The Three of Wands can show that you are in control and have a strong position, just like the character that overlooks and stands strong. The Three of Wands is one of the main cards of foresight and vision.   
  
The last Three of Wands meaning is that of travel in search of what you are seeking. There is a sense of leaving home, a voyage that must be undertaken. Great things do not happen to those that simply wait for them, you must expand. For most readings, this shows that you may travel to a new land over the water and that you may find an opportunity during your travels.
metadata.upright_love_meaning: With the 3 of Wands, it seems that your love life is heading to its next phase. Should you find yourself in a new relationship, it looks like you’ll have to make sure to create a strong foundation for lasting commitment. If you’re in a committed relationship, this can be a great moment to set sight of your goals as a couple, and work together to achieve those goals. Have that conversation of what it means to move in together; communication about even the most mundane details can ensure that you take this step with the least amount of frustration as possible. Alternatively, this card also can signal travel; take the chance to explore the world together - or if you’re single, new places can spark the love you’re looking for.
metadata.upright_career_meaning: When upright, the three of wands depicts adventure and new experiences in every aspect of our life. This is true in the career position as well. Right now, you are likely to experience new opportunities to explore your career. Beyond that, your career can push to make bold choices that you might otherwise be hesitant to make. Here, it signifies a new chance or daring opportunity. This could mean starting a job abroad or otherwise traveling for work when you would not normally feel inclined to do so. This also applies to business. If you own a business and have debated going global, now is a good time to do so.
metadata.upright_finances_meaning: The three of wands, when upright, signals a time when you can enjoy the profits of your hard work. Your hours of labor are being rewarded. Don’t be afraid to spend your hard-earned money on something that broadens your horizons such as a trip or extended journey. If you have been debating a class or trip but held off for financial reasons, the cards are telling you now is your chance to embrace these desires and expand your mind. Your ideas of what financial stability and your relationship to money may be expanding now as well.
metadata.reversal_meaning:
The reversed Three of Wands indicates that you may have been embarking on personal journeys or developments, but you have not received the achievements that you were hoping for. This could be due to delays or road blocks. Despite all this, the card reminds you that all of your work has not been for nothing, but rather that it has helped you with your personal strength and fortitude.  
  
The Three of Wands reversed can also mean you need to take some time to plan your future. This is especially true if you have not started on your long term goals or have become overwhelmed by the tasks that you face now, or will have to face soon. You are only reacting and not acting with thought and deliberation.  
  
However, the most common Three of Wands reversed meaning is a nudge to include planning for future changes, and to watch for better options in case that they show up. The figure on the Three of Wands knows this and always keeps his eyes open for how the future could change, and it is a worthy lesson to learn.
metadata.reversal_love_meaning:
Sometimes you can't say or do the right thing; if this is the case it might seem easier to hide your head in the sand. This would be unwise; you really need to get any issues addressed and problems sorted now.  
The course of true love is seldom entirely smooth and any recent relationships may struggle to get off the ground, this doesn't mean they don't have wings, just that a bit of patience is called for. Trying to force things forward will be counterproductive. Before committing to a relationship, check your partner is all you think they are.  
In all relationships we have to compromise from time to time, demanding your partner changes to suit you can cause problems. Are you being realistic?
metadata.reversal_career_meaning: Reversed, the three of wands can indicate frustration, stagnation or rejecting opportunities that are being presented to you. There may be many things that you wanted to explore, but you might feel boxed in or like you’ve let chances go by without capitalizing on them. Perhaps you turned down the chance to go somewhere else for a new job or expand your business globally. If you have not recently made such decisions, it could be that your frustration and annoyance with a lack of progression or challenge at your workplace is taking its toll.
metadata.reversal_finances_meaning: In this position and with this orientation, the three of wands signifies that you may be in a state of financial chaos. It might not be that you are lacking money, but there are delays in being able to achieve your financial goals. If this card appears to you here, take better stock of what funds you have coming in and how much of it is going out. You may be able to weather this period without economic loss if you are more diligent. Be aware of your finances and take charge of them.

Three_of_Wands_Meaning.markdown:
3 of Wands Keywords
-------------------

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| **Upright Keywords** | **Reversed Keywords** |
| momentum, confidence, expansion, growth, foresight, looking ahead | restriction, limitations, lack of progress, obstacles, delays, frustration |
| [Skip to Upright Meaning](#up) | [Skip to Reversed Meaning](#rev) |

![Comparing the Three of Wands  across multiple decks. From left to right, the Classic 1910 Rider Waite Smith Deck, the Tarot de Marseille, the Seventh Sphere Tarot and the Arcana Iris Sacra.](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/1325/0879/files/3-three-of-wands-tarot-card-deck-comparisons-meanings-keywords.webp)

Comparing the Three of Wands across different tarot decks.

The Three of Wands Tarot Card Description
-----------------------------------------

The Three of Wands depicts a man who is standing on the edge of a cliff, looking over the ocean and the mountains. From the cliff edge, he sees everything that is ahead of him. The Wands are planted into the ground and surround the man as he grasps one in his hand. He seems to look forward and reflect on both the commitment that he has for his plans, as well as the method of execution in order to bring them to reality.

Upright Three of Wands Meaning
------------------------------

The meaning of the Three of Wands hints that you are planning or going to plan for the future with more conviction. This could mean that everything around your plans is going smoothly, as you have taken the time to plan your future, and are taking steps to turn plans into action. It hints that you are perhaps creating a stable foundation for yourself.  
  
The symbolism within the Three of Wands is that opportunities that can take place to widen your horizons in many areas. It also is a warning to keep your mind open as better opportunities could open up to you. As you take steps towards achieving what you set out to do, you are also becoming more aware of opportunities that are coming your way, and this could be take you out of your comfort zone. This pushes you to sometimes embrace change, and to start thinking in the long-term.

> The Three of Wands hints that you are creating a stable foundation for yourself.

The Three of Wands can show that you are in control and have a strong position, just like the character that overlooks and stands strong. The Three of Wands is one of the main cards of foresight and vision.   
  
The last Three of Wands meaning is that of travel in search of what you are seeking. There is a sense of leaving home, a voyage that must be undertaken. Great things do not happen to those that simply wait for them, you must expand. For most readings, this shows that you may travel to a new land over the water and that you may find an opportunity during your travels.

|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Upright Love Meaning** | **Upright Career Meaning** | **Upright Finances Meaning** |
| next stage in relationship, romantic momentum, creating lasting foundation | new horizons in career, expanding your career options | expanding views about finances, expanding financial goals |

### Upright 3 of Wands Tarot Love Meaning

With the 3 of Wands, it seems that your love life is heading to its next phase. Should you find yourself in a new relationship, it looks like you’ll have to make sure to create a strong foundation for lasting commitment. If you’re in a committed relationship, this can be a great moment to set sight of your goals as a couple, and work together to achieve those goals. Have that conversation of what it means to move in together; communication about even the most mundane details can ensure that you take this step with the least amount of frustration as possible. Alternatively, this card also can signal travel; take the chance to explore the world together - or if you’re single, new places can spark the love you’re looking for.

### Career Meaning - Upright 3 of Wands

When upright, the three of wands depicts adventure and new experiences in every aspect of our life. This is true in the career position as well. Right now, you are likely to experience new opportunities to explore your career. Beyond that, your career can push to make bold choices that you might otherwise be hesitant to make. Here, it signifies a new chance or daring opportunity. This could mean starting a job abroad or otherwise traveling for work when you would not normally feel inclined to do so. This also applies to business. If you own a business and have debated going global, now is a good time to do so.

### Finances Meaning - Upright 3 of Wands

The three of wands, when upright, signals a time when you can enjoy the profits of your hard work. Your hours of labor are being rewarded. Don’t be afraid to spend your hard-earned money on something that broadens your horizons such as a trip or extended journey. If you have been debating a class or trip but held off for financial reasons, the cards are telling you now is your chance to embrace these desires and expand your mind. Your ideas of what financial stability and your relationship to money may be expanding now as well.

### Upright Three of Wands as Feelings

The upright Three of Wands signals a moment to reflect on someone’s feelings for you, brimming with anticipation and optimism. This person sees the potential in your connection and is excited about what lies ahead. Inspired by your presence, they envision growth and new opportunities together. Their hopefulness reveals an appreciation for your qualities and a desire to explore where this relationship can lead.  
  
As for your own feelings, the Three of Wands ignites a surge of enthusiasm for what’s coming. You may feel adventurous, ready to embrace new experiences or challenges that await you. Trust in the journey unfolding before you, staying open to possibilities that could enrich both your life and this blossoming relationship.

### Upright Three of Wands as Actions

When you draw the upright Three of Wands, it’s a clear signal that now is the time to expand your horizons and embrace new opportunities. You should be actively seeking out ways to broaden your perspective, whether through travel, education, or networking. Consider setting clear goals for what you want to achieve in the near future and take concrete steps toward those ambitions. This could mean enrolling in a course that excites you or reaching out to mentors who can guide you. Embrace collaboration with others; sharing ideas can lead to innovative solutions. By taking these actions, you'll cultivate growth and open doors that align with your aspirations.

Reversed Three of Wands Meaning
-------------------------------

The reversed Three of Wands indicates that you may have been embarking on personal journeys or developments, but you have not received the achievements that you were hoping for. This could be due to delays or road blocks. Despite all this, the card reminds you that all of your work has not been for nothing, but rather that it has helped you with your personal strength and fortitude.  
  
The Three of Wands reversed can also mean you need to take some time to plan your future. This is especially true if you have not started on your long term goals or have become overwhelmed by the tasks that you face now, or will have to face soon. You are only reacting and not acting with thought and deliberation.  
  
However, the most common Three of Wands reversed meaning is a nudge to include planning for future changes, and to watch for better options in case that they show up. The figure on the Three of Wands knows this and always keeps his eyes open for how the future could change, and it is a worthy lesson to learn.

|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Reversed Love Meaning** | **Reversed Career Meaning** | **Reversed Finances Meaning** |
| frustrations or obstacles in love, learning to compromise in love | obstacles in career path, lack of growth and challenge, feeling caged | delays in achieving financial goals |

### Reversed 3 of Wands Tarot Love Meaning

Sometimes you can't say or do the right thing; if this is the case it might seem easier to hide your head in the sand. This would be unwise; you really need to get any issues addressed and problems sorted now.  
The course of true love is seldom entirely smooth and any recent relationships may struggle to get off the ground, this doesn't mean they don't have wings, just that a bit of patience is called for. Trying to force things forward will be counterproductive. Before committing to a relationship, check your partner is all you think they are.  
In all relationships we have to compromise from time to time, demanding your partner changes to suit you can cause problems. Are you being realistic?

### Career Meaning - Reversed 3 of Wands

Reversed, the three of wands can indicate frustration, stagnation or rejecting opportunities that are being presented to you. There may be many things that you wanted to explore, but you might feel boxed in or like you’ve let chances go by without capitalizing on them. Perhaps you turned down the chance to go somewhere else for a new job or expand your business globally. If you have not recently made such decisions, it could be that your frustration and annoyance with a lack of progression or challenge at your workplace is taking its toll.

### Finances Meaning - Reversed 3 of Wands

In this position and with this orientation, the three of wands signifies that you may be in a state of financial chaos. It might not be that you are lacking money, but there are delays in being able to achieve your financial goals. If this card appears to you here, take better stock of what funds you have coming in and how much of it is going out. You may be able to weather this period without economic loss if you are more diligent. Be aware of your finances and take charge of them.

### Reversed Three of Wands as Feelings

When you draw the reversed Three of Wands, it suggests that the person you are asking about feels a sense of disappointment or frustration regarding your connection. They may be struggling with uncertainty and lack direction, leading them to question their feelings for you. This card indicates they might feel unfulfilled or hesitant to invest further, possibly due to past experiences that have left them wary.  
  
This is a mirror for how you are feeling. Perhaps you're grappling with impatience or disillusionment in this situation. You might find yourself longing for progress but feeling stuck instead. It’s essential to recognize these emotions and consider what steps can help reignite your passion and clarity moving forward.

### Reversed Three of Wands as Actions

In terms of your journey, drawing the Three of Wands reversed suggests that now is a time for introspection and reassessment of your goals. You may be feeling stuck or uncertain about your direction, urging you to pause and reflect on what truly matters to you. Instead of pushing forward blindly, take a step back to evaluate your plans and consider new perspectives. Engage in activities like journaling or meditating to clarify your vision. Additionally, reach out for feedback from trusted friends or mentors who can provide fresh insights. This period calls for patience; focus on refining your aspirations before taking decisive action again.

Three of Wands Tarot Cheat Sheet
--------------------------------

![Three of Wands Meaning - Tarot Card Meanings Cheat Sheet](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/1325/0879/files/tarot-card-meanings-suit-wands-three-of-wands.png?v=1487912673)

metadata.title: Five of Wands Meaning - Tarot Card Meanings
metadata.author: Tina Gong
metadata.description: The Five of Wands depicts five men all holding their own wands and brandishing them up in the air. Like with most fives in the tarot, it is about some kind of disagreement that is facing the querent. This disagreement can either be taken to be as a sign of conflict between the men, or that all of them are simply enjoying the adrenaline rush of this conflict, and that the competition amongst them is of a good natured rivalry, not anger. The relaxed way in which they seem to be holding their wands gives a sense that this argument may be one of show rather than a fierce one.
metadata.upright_meaning:
From the image on the card, the symbolism in the Five of Wands suggests that there is form of conflict in one’s life. This may be an existing conflict or one that is brewing and may eventually blow up in one's face. It may also depict a problem in communication, for example in a situation where no one really wants to listen to the other - meaning that no agreement or understanding takes place. The five men may signify problems in a group of people who are not patient enough to listen to what anyone else is saying. They only want to be heard, and since none of the others will listen, they all argue at once.

Much of this can be solved by the querent taking the first step to try and initiate communication in such a way that you suggest that everyone airs out what they have to say, one at a time. By doing this, you will be able to address the problem, and everyone will be heard. Meaning they’ll all be satisfied.  
  
The Five of Wands can also mean that you are or will be facing competition in an area that you are not used to. This can be at work or school where you will meet people with the same abilities as you who pose quite a challenge - leading to feelings of jealousy, greed, and envy. This tarot card encourages that you accept the competition as a way for you to improve yourself without feeling any malice towards them. This means that you should learn how to cope with them in a civil way.

> This tarot card encourages that you accept the competition as a way for you to improve yourself without feeling any malice towards them.

The Five of Wands meaning could also be a personal struggle that you are dealing with on your own. This can be on a number of issues that affect you, hence you need to address them and find a solution for them. You will need to identify where the problems are and offer a solution that will handle the case.
metadata.upright_love_meaning: Action is required of you now when it comes to your love life. If you’re single, you may find that the one you desire can have many suitors, and you may have to compete for their affection. Make sure not to be carried away by this, and become too forceful; this can discourage your potential partner instead of drawing them closer. Should you already be in a relationship, there may be some small conflicts. Beware that what initially starts off as playful banter can turn into explosive arguments when either of you are stressed. It’s likely the arguments here are not too serious. Nonetheless, they will require some lightheartedness to remember how inconsequential they actually are to your happiness. Keep things playful.
metadata.upright_career_meaning: If you find the five of wands in this position, the conflicting and competitive nature of this card applies to your career. This might be a permanent condition as a result of your line of work. This card is common among people working in industries such as sales, banking, and athletes. If that is not the case and your job does not have a competitive element, it is likely a temporary state as a result of conflict over specific issues. You might be fighting against one individual for a raise or position. Regardless of the specific conflicts you face at the moment, you will have to contend with the egos of others. Thanks to the five appearing in the upright position here, it is clear that you are capable of defeating the challenges in front of you and banishing what is attempting to block your path. Remember, you are able to succeed, but you must fight for that victory.
metadata.upright_finances_meaning: You might be in a time of financial instability if you see the five here. It is temporary, but you must battle your way out of it. This battle can be in the form of needing to work particularly hard or otherwise exerting significant effort to control your financial state. If your current state is not imbalanced, it might be that you are going to argue about money soon. This argument could be either with someone you love or with a stranger such as a clerk or a shop assistant. You might find that simple tasks such as making a return or getting reimbursed is stressful and rife with disputes.
metadata.reversal_meaning: The Five of Wands reversed meaning can be that your natural method of dealing with disagreements is avoiding any kind of conflict by getting away from that place as fast as you can. Sometimes this can be regarded as a good thing, but other times, it may lead to a number of issues that are brewing up within you, for which you will have to address soon. On the other hand, it can also mean that you have worked through your troubles and that you do not have any more issues to worry about.
metadata.reversal_love_meaning: Issues of how you deal with conflict can affect your relationships now. If you’re in a relationship, ensure that you haven’t been bottling up your resentments to avoid conflicts that the two of you need to have a smooth partnership. Eventually avoiding difficult conversations lead to an erosion of trust. Remember that every person has the right to their needs, and having needs does not make you any less lovable. If you’ve been doing the hard work of expressing yourself honestly with your partner however, you may find that misunderstandings are clearing up. What were once arguments may disappear once honesty and clarity have been achieved.
metadata.reversal_career_meaning: A reversed five of wands here means that the conflict and competition which has been in your work-life recently is ending. It might be that you are moving to a less competitive industry or the environment around you is gradually becoming more friendly and relaxed. Regardless, this is a welcome change. It is a reprieve from your recent work conflicts that will allow you to invest your energy in other aspects of your life.
metadata.reversal_finances_meaning: The reversed five of wands here has two potential meanings. The context in which the card appears is crucial as it indicates which of these two meanings applies to you. Surrounded by supportive cards, it can mean a turn away from financial stress. You have completed a battle against your own finances and are about to enter a more stable time. Without the support of other cards, it can mean an escalation in conflict over money with loved ones. In that circumstance, any debates you might be having with those around you about money are likely to increase and persist.

Five_of_Wands_Meaning.markdown:
5 of Wands Keywords
-------------------

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| **Upright Keywords** | **Reversed Keywords** |
| conflict, competition, arguments, aggression, tension, rivals, clashes of ego | end of conflict, cooperation, agreements, truces, harmony, peace, avoiding conflict |
| [Skip to Upright Meaning](#up) | [Skip to Reversed Meaning](#rev) |

![Comparing the Five of Wands  across multiple decks. From left to right, the Classic 1910 Rider Waite Smith Deck, the Tarot de Marseille, the Seventh Sphere Tarot and the Arcana Iris Sacra.](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/1325/0879/files/5-five-of-wands-tarot-card-deck-comparisons-meanings-keywords.webp)

Comparing the Five of Wands across different tarot decks.

The Five of Wands Tarot Card Description
----------------------------------------

The Five of Wands depicts five men all holding their own wands and brandishing them up in the air. Like with most fives in the tarot, it is about some kind of disagreement that is facing the querent. This disagreement can either be taken to be as a sign of conflict between the men, or that all of them are simply enjoying the adrenaline rush of this conflict, and that the competition amongst them is of a good natured rivalry, not anger. The relaxed way in which they seem to be holding their wands gives a sense that this argument may be one of show rather than a fierce one.

Upright Five of Wands Meaning
-----------------------------

From the image on the card, the symbolism in the Five of Wands suggests that there is form of conflict in one’s life. This may be an existing conflict or one that is brewing and may eventually blow up in one's face. It may also depict a problem in communication, for example in a situation where no one really wants to listen to the other - meaning that no agreement or understanding takes place. The five men may signify problems in a group of people who are not patient enough to listen to what anyone else is saying. They only want to be heard, and since none of the others will listen, they all argue at once.

Much of this can be solved by the querent taking the first step to try and initiate communication in such a way that you suggest that everyone airs out what they have to say, one at a time. By doing this, you will be able to address the problem, and everyone will be heard. Meaning they’ll all be satisfied.  
  
The Five of Wands can also mean that you are or will be facing competition in an area that you are not used to. This can be at work or school where you will meet people with the same abilities as you who pose quite a challenge - leading to feelings of jealousy, greed, and envy. This tarot card encourages that you accept the competition as a way for you to improve yourself without feeling any malice towards them. This means that you should learn how to cope with them in a civil way.

> This tarot card encourages that you accept the competition as a way for you to improve yourself without feeling any malice towards them.

The Five of Wands meaning could also be a personal struggle that you are dealing with on your own. This can be on a number of issues that affect you, hence you need to address them and find a solution for them. You will need to identify where the problems are and offer a solution that will handle the case.

|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Upright Love Meaning** | **Upright Career Meaning** | **Upright Finances Meaning** |
| competition between suitors, conflict between lovers, playful banter | competition between colleagues, competitive work environment, conflict | financial instability, conflicts about money |

### Upright 5 of Wands Tarot Love Meaning

Action is required of you now when it comes to your love life. If you’re single, you may find that the one you desire can have many suitors, and you may have to compete for their affection. Make sure not to be carried away by this, and become too forceful; this can discourage your potential partner instead of drawing them closer. Should you already be in a relationship, there may be some small conflicts. Beware that what initially starts off as playful banter can turn into explosive arguments when either of you are stressed. It’s likely the arguments here are not too serious. Nonetheless, they will require some lightheartedness to remember how inconsequential they actually are to your happiness. Keep things playful.

### Career Meaning - Upright 5 of Wands

If you find the five of wands in this position, the conflicting and competitive nature of this card applies to your career. This might be a permanent condition as a result of your line of work. This card is common among people working in industries such as sales, banking, and athletes. If that is not the case and your job does not have a competitive element, it is likely a temporary state as a result of conflict over specific issues. You might be fighting against one individual for a raise or position. Regardless of the specific conflicts you face at the moment, you will have to contend with the egos of others. Thanks to the five appearing in the upright position here, it is clear that you are capable of defeating the challenges in front of you and banishing what is attempting to block your path. Remember, you are able to succeed, but you must fight for that victory.

### Finances Meaning - Upright 5 of Wands

You might be in a time of financial instability if you see the five here. It is temporary, but you must battle your way out of it. This battle can be in the form of needing to work particularly hard or otherwise exerting significant effort to control your financial state. If your current state is not imbalanced, it might be that you are going to argue about money soon. This argument could be either with someone you love or with a stranger such as a clerk or a shop assistant. You might find that simple tasks such as making a return or getting reimbursed is stressful and rife with disputes.

### Upright Five of Wands as Feelings

When the upright Five of Wands appears in your reading about someone’s feelings for you, it reveals a swirl of competition and conflict within their emotions. They feel challenged by your presence, as if they’re fighting for your attention or approval. This card indicates mixed feelings; there’s undeniable attraction, but also uncertainty and frustration. You ignite both excitement and rivalry in their heart.  
  
As you reflect on your own emotions, the Five of Wands shows that you might be wrestling with inner turmoil or conflicting desires regarding this person. You may feel a rush of passion while recognizing the challenges that accompany it. Embrace these complexities instead of shying away from them. Navigating this emotional landscape can lead to growth and deeper understanding between you both.

### Upright Five of Wands as Actions

When you draw the upright Five of Wands, it’s a signal that now is a time for healthy competition and collaboration. Embrace challenges as opportunities to grow, both personally and professionally. Engage in discussions or debates with others; these interactions can spark new ideas and perspectives. Consider joining a group or team where you can share your skills while learning from others. This card encourages you to step out of your comfort zone, so take on projects that push your limits. By actively participating in this dynamic environment, you'll not only sharpen your abilities but also foster connections that could lead to future success.

Reversed Five of Wands Meaning
------------------------------

The Five of Wands reversed meaning can be that your natural method of dealing with disagreements is avoiding any kind of conflict by getting away from that place as fast as you can. Sometimes this can be regarded as a good thing, but other times, it may lead to a number of issues that are brewing up within you, for which you will have to address soon. On the other hand, it can also mean that you have worked through your troubles and that you do not have any more issues to worry about.

|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Reversed Love Meaning** | **Reversed Career Meaning** | **Reversed Finances Meaning** |
| avoiding conflict, trying to keep peace in relationship, resolution | competition or conflict at workplace is resolved, avoiding work conflict | peace after financial stress, escalation in conflicts about money |

### Reversed 5 of Wands Tarot Love Meaning

Issues of how you deal with conflict can affect your relationships now. If you’re in a relationship, ensure that you haven’t been bottling up your resentments to avoid conflicts that the two of you need to have a smooth partnership. Eventually avoiding difficult conversations lead to an erosion of trust. Remember that every person has the right to their needs, and having needs does not make you any less lovable. If you’ve been doing the hard work of expressing yourself honestly with your partner however, you may find that misunderstandings are clearing up. What were once arguments may disappear once honesty and clarity have been achieved.

### Career Meaning - Reversed 5 of Wands

A reversed five of wands here means that the conflict and competition which has been in your work-life recently is ending. It might be that you are moving to a less competitive industry or the environment around you is gradually becoming more friendly and relaxed. Regardless, this is a welcome change. It is a reprieve from your recent work conflicts that will allow you to invest your energy in other aspects of your life.

### Finances Meaning - Reversed 5 of Wands

The reversed five of wands here has two potential meanings. The context in which the card appears is crucial as it indicates which of these two meanings applies to you. Surrounded by supportive cards, it can mean a turn away from financial stress. You have completed a battle against your own finances and are about to enter a more stable time. Without the support of other cards, it can mean an escalation in conflict over money with loved ones. In that circumstance, any debates you might be having with those around you about money are likely to increase and persist.

### Reversed Five of Wands as Feelings

The arrival of the reversed Five of Wands suggests that this person is moving away from conflict and competition. They may feel a sense of relief or peace regarding their emotions towards you, indicating they are ready to let go of any previous tensions or misunderstandings. This shift points to a desire for harmony and collaboration rather than rivalry, suggesting they see potential for growth in your relationship.  
  
With regard to your own feelings, the reversed Five of Wands reflects an internal struggle where you might be seeking resolution and clarity amidst confusion. You could be feeling overwhelmed by competing thoughts or emotions but are now yearning for tranquility and understanding within yourself. This card encourages you to embrace cooperation over conflict, allowing space for healing as you navigate your feelings with newfound openness.

### Reversed Five of Wands as Actions

The appearance of the reversed Five of Wands points to a crucial moment for seeking harmony instead of diving into conflict. You should focus on collaboration and understanding, stepping away from competitive or confrontational situations. This may involve reassessing your current projects or relationships, identifying areas where cooperation can replace rivalry. Consider reaching out to colleagues for a brainstorming session instead of competing for ideas. Embrace open communication with those around you, fostering an environment where everyone feels valued. By prioritizing unity over discord, you will create a more productive atmosphere that benefits not just yourself but also those involved.

Five of Wands Tarot Cheat Sheet
-------------------------------

![Five of Wands Meaning - Tarot Card Meanings Cheat Sheet](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/1325/0879/files/tarot-card-meanings-suit-wands-five-of-wands.png?v=1487913695)

metadata.title: Six of Wands Meaning - Tarot Card Meanings
metadata.author: Tina Gong
metadata.description: The Six of Wands tarot card depicts a man who is currently wearing a wreath of victory around his head. He is depicted riding a horse through a crowd of people who are cheering. The horse is white, which is a well-known symbol of strength, purity as well as success. The crowd is there to show the public’s recognition for the achievements of the man riding the horse. The wand that the man is carrying also has a wreath which is tied to it in an attempt to further emphasize his success. The man is not afraid, or shy about all of this attention but rather proud with his accomplishments. To this, the crowd around him reacts with cheerfulness and enthusiasm.
metadata.upright_meaning:
This particular card is all about public recognition, victory, and success. Not only have you managed to properly succeed in achieving all of your goals, but you are also being publicly acknowledged for them and the results that you’ve managed to attain. You may have received an award or some sort of public acclaim.   
  
The card is indicative that you have managed to harness the strengths and talents that you have within you in an attempt to bring a particularly successful outcome in your life. You have managed to properly get through the confusion which is brought by the card before this one – the Five of Wands, and managed to properly minimize distractions, thus successfully focusing on your goals and achieving them.

> The card is indicative that you have managed to harness the strengths and talents that you have within you in an attempt to bring a particularly successful outcome in your life.

It’s also worth noting that there is a slight downside apart from the overall positivity that stems from the card. It can bring self-importance as well as egotistical behavior and arrogance. This could make you think that nobody is better than you.
metadata.upright_love_meaning: If you’re single, the 6 of Wands tarot love meaning signals that success is coming your way. It may be that others find you especially attractive right now. If you’ve been searching for someone, they may be more receptive to you than usual. All it takes is you making your approach. If you’re in a relationship, and you’ve been working together towards something, like moving in together after a long distance relationship, or buying a home, these goals are likely to come into fruition. The future between you seems bright, and can bring the two of you much joy.
metadata.upright_career_meaning: This six of wands is generally a very positive card that signifies success and self-confidence. These principles apply to your work-life when it appears in this position. You have likely reached an achievement at work of which you are particularly proud of. Rewards are also likely to come your way; it can mean a promotion or raise is forthcoming or recently occurred. If you recently completed a project, it will likely have good results. Whatever battles you have fought recently have been resolved in your favor. Savor this moment of contentment and confidence. Do not let your assuredness venture into egoism, but you can celebrate the end of previous conflicts and enjoy your current position.
metadata.upright_finances_meaning: You are in a solid financial position if this card appears here. Thanks to your dedication and perseverance in times of trouble, you are currently enjoying a moment of peace and financial stability.
